name: aep-conformance
description: Machine-readable index of the aep-record conformance fixture set. Each entry names a fixture, whether it MUST pass (valid) or MUST fail (invalid) against the canonical aep-record schema, and for invalid cases the JSON Schema keyword the violation is expected to trip. Consumers iterate these fixtures to self-check their emitter output.

fixtures.description: Minimal record carrying only the three required top-level fields (schema_version, run_id, created_at_ms).
Record using the legacy aep/v0.1 schema_version plus optional scalar provenance fields.
Record exercising capability_decisions, actions, verifier_results, and the signature envelope.
Record exercising a fully-populated budget_ledger (all six budget kinds) and run_context.
Record exercising input_refs (with taint_labels) and output_refs (with redaction_profile).
schema_version is outside the allowed aep/v0.1, aep/v0.2 enum.
Missing the required run_id top-level field.
Missing the required created_at_ms top-level field.
A capability decision uses a value outside the allow/deny/ask_user/dry_run enum.
An action is missing the required tool_name field.
An action timestamp_ms is a string rather than a number.
The signature block is present but missing its required sig field.
